demo.title: stakr-vault.sh
demo.code:
# Create an agent-owned vault on Base via Bankr
bankr agent prompt "Create a Stakr vault on Base for USDC using factory 0x7Ef55108fa37472296DA59D2287FdA92cd21A0d0, set me as owner"

# Add a new reward token (1000 USDC, 7-day window starting tomorrow)
bankr agent prompt "Call addRewardToken on Stakr vault 0x... with token 0x... amount 1000 USDC starting tomorrow for 7 days"

# Or submit raw calldata directly
bankr wallet submit --to <vault-address> --data <encoded-calldata> --chain base

# Extend an existing reward (top up + extend window)
bankr agent prompt "Call modifyRewardToken on vault 0x... add 500 USDC and extend endTime by 7 days"

# Stream rewards weekly (fund in chunks)
bankr agent prompt "Call modifyRewardToken on vault 0x... add 200 USDC and push endTime one more week"

setup: Create vault: call `createStakrVault(underlying, name, symbol, description, owner)` via Bankr
Approve the vault to pull reward tokens before calling `addRewardToken`
Use `bankr agent prompt` for natural-language vault interactions
Use `bankr wallet submit --to <vault> --data <calldata> --chain base` for raw calldata
